# wowmcp.ai

Model Context Protocol server for World of Warcraft data. 10 tools for raid strategy, character analysis, auction house intelligence, M+ routing, and more.

Part of the MEOK AI Labs sovereign hive: https://meok.ai

## Pages
- Home: https://wowmcp.ai/
- Pricing: https://wowmcp.ai/pricing
- Signup: https://wowmcp.ai/signup
- Partner: https://wowmcp.ai/partner
